provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, charming human male in his 30s with an easy smile and a hidden tension in his shoulders, wearing a decent leather jacket probably stolen from a free trader with the patches removed and his own mismatched patches sewn on, a dark thermal henley underneath, cargo trousers with secret compartments sewn into the lining, boots with hollow heels, a standard-looking data pad that actually has heavily encrypted storage, he looks almost respectable which is how smuggling works
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy, superhero, symmetrical matching armor

judgment.explanation: Sable Reach outlaw. Salvaged, stolen, and improvised gear. Nothing matches, nothing is new, everything tells a survival story.
